videos.headline: Justin Marshall makes a long haul to the end zone
videos.description: Justin Marshall takes it to the house for a 73 yard rushing touchdown and gives Colorado State the first score of the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Justin Marshall makes a long haul to the end zone) 2025/10/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: Javion Kinnard gives the Rams a 14-0 lead early vs. the Bulldogs
videos.description: Jackson Brousseau finds Javion Kinnard for a 29-yard touchdown as the Rams keep on rolling.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Javion Kinnard gives the Rams a 14-0 lead early vs. the Bulldogs) 2025/10/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: Lloyd Avant punches in a 12-yard TD for Colorado State
videos.description: Lloyd Avant gets a 12-yard rushing touchdown to extend the lead to 42-21 for Colorado State over Fresno State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Lloyd Avant punches in a 12-yard TD for Colorado State) 2025/10/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: Rocky Beers takes it to the house for a Colorado State TD
videos.description: Jackson Brousseau finds Rocky Beers for a touchdown to stretch Colorado State’s lead to 28–7.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Rocky Beers takes it to the house for a Colorado State TD) 2025/10/11 ESHEET
